name: Derek Grasty
background: Teacher, principal, and public servant who has worked across California supporting diverse communities.
statement: I come from a working class community. I believe that everyone should have a good quality of life. That means affordable housing, a safe community and a quality education. My life experiences have taught me that anything is possible. My work across California as a teacher, principal and public servant supporting diverse communities, has prepared me to tackle statewide issues. Together, we will keep kidnappers (ICE) off our streets, make housing affordable for working families, first responders, teachers, firefighters, and nurses. Education will be supported with pre-school, reading specialists, and mental health counselors to help our students thrive. Let's make California truly the Golden State.

positions.economy: Affordable housing for working families, first responders, teachers, firefighters, and nurses
positions.education: Pre-school support; reading specialists; mental health counselors

contact.address: 2231 Will Wool Road, San Jose, CA 95112
